title: Keto Egyptian-Style Pilaf
description: A keto twist on traditional Egyptian pilaf, made with crunchy pilaf and topped with a creamy cottage cheese sauce.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the pilaf and cottage cheese.
Mix well until the pilaf is evenly coated with the cottage cheese.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and sprinkle with shredded cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
While the pilaf is baking, crack an egg into a bowl and mix with minced garlic.
Once the pilaf is done, remove it from the oven and top with the egg mixture.
Return the pilaf to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the egg is cooked through.
Note: You can also add some diced veggies like spinach or bell peppers to the pilaf for added nutrition and flavor.
Make sure to adjust the cooking time accordingly if you add any extra ingredients.
